gameTitle: Need for Speed: Carbon - Own the City

achievements.title: Back in the Game
achievements.description: Reunite with old friends and assemble your crew.

achievements.description: Win an Instant Race.

achievements.description: Win a Rival Crew Challenge.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Escape Artist
achievements.description: Finish any Escape event with at least 30 seconds remaining.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Same-Second Shipping
achievements.description: Finish any Delivery event in 45 seconds or less.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: You Provoked a Crew War
achievements.description: Takedown 25 rival cars in a Crew Takedown event.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Power Struggle
achievements.description: Takedown a total of 50 rival cars.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Crew Warfare
achievements.description: Takedown a total of 100 rival cars.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Double Agent
achievements.description: Finish a Crew Takedown event with your car using the rival crew's vinyl.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Gone in 30 Seconds
achievements.description: Evade a police pursuit in 30 seconds or less.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Who Needs Pursuit Breakers...
achievements.description: Immobilize 8 police vehicles in a single pursuit and evade.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Are Friends Powerful?
achievements.description: Reach 1000 Crew Respect points.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Skill Farming
achievements.description: Earn 32 skill points in a race.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: There's No "I" in Crew
achievements.description: Use your wingmen's special moves 100 times.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Take Me on a Rocket Ride
achievements.description: Use drafter 10 times in a single Career event and win the race.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: All Draft and No Draft
achievements.description: Keep your drafter activated for a full lap.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: The Dream Team
achievements.description: Get 5 confirmed assassin or brawler hits in a single Career event and win the race.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Assassin Supreme
achievements.description: Have 3 rivals taken down by your Crew at the same time.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Iron Man
achievements.description: Win Crossover in Storage using any of the starter cars in Career.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: War Machine
achievements.description: Win South Side in Storage or Rock Quarry using any of the starter cars in Career.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Hell or High Horsepower
achievements.description: Win Big East Hwy. in Junkyard or Rock Quarry using any of the starter cars in Career.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Homegrown Rides
achievements.description: Win High to Low in Rock Quarry using any of the starter cars in Career.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: The Mad Dash
achievements.description: Win Cross Town Sprint in Junkyard or Rock Quarry using any of the starter cars in Career.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: Knockout King
achievements.description: Win a Lap Knockout in Storage or Junkyard using any of the starter cars in Career.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: The EA Games 250
achievements.description: Win Centrifugal (Forward) in Single Race on hard with 5 laps and 5 opponents in under 4:25.
achievements.author: ryoxd

achievements.title: The EA Games 500
achievements.description: Win Big East Hwy. (Forward) in Single Race on hard with 5 laps and 5 opponents in under 10:00.
achievements.author: ryoxd
